chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.2108 of 2024 ( Taifullah Khan Marwat vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Bail Application. 28.10.2024. Mr. Mr. Jahan, Advocate a/w Applicant Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh a/w complainant O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Complainant is a store owner situated at Chandi Chowk near NADRA office. On 27.03.2023 three persons duly armed stormed into his store and committed robbery. On his resistance, they fired and injured him. In an attempt to flee from the seen, one co-accused Muhammad Nabi was apprehended. In the investigation two other accused have been identified as Sadam Hussain and Aziz, who are still absconder. 2. The role assigned to the applicant is that he had given his motorcycle to the accused for commission of offence. Learned Addl: PG Sindh has submitted that motorcycle was unregistered. Except the statement of the police that motorcycle was given by the applicant to the accused for commission of offence, no other evidence has come on record to connect the applicant with the alleged offence. Complainant is present and submits that applicant was not among the accused, who had committed the offence in his store. In view of above, a case of further enquiry is made out and it is yet to be determined whether or not the applicant with intention and purpose had facilitated the accused by giving them motorcycle for commission of robbery /dacoity. 3. In view of the above facts and circumstances, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 28.03.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 4.

In view of above, a case of further enquiry is made out and it is yet to be determined whether or not the applicant with intention and purpose had facilitated the accused by giving them motorcycle for commission of robbery /dacoity. 3. In view of the above facts and circumstances, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 28.03.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 4. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
